title: Explosives Enhanced
description: A mod that adds new explosives to the game!
body:
# Explosives Enhanced

Explosives Enhanced is a mod that adds new explosives to Minecraft to make technical combat even more interesting!

## Features

Grenade: A throwable explosive! Use this item and watch it explode on impact!

Dynamite: Instant-explosion TNT! Stand back, power it, and watch it explode instantly!

Landscaper: Instant flattener! This will explode blocks in the explosion radius, but only above or to the side of it!

## Crafting

Crafting recipes can be found in the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/explosives-enhanced/gallery).
